column2: # Arrange data by ID and day to make sure values are in correct order
# Calculate 'growthL' by subtracting the first Length value for each ID from the current Length
# Filter out rows where 'growthL' is NA
scatter_growth<- ggplot(df, aes(x = day, y = growthL, color = as.character(release_group))) +
geom_point(size=0.5) +  # Use points for individual measurements
labs(x = "Days of Growth", y = "Change in Forklength (mm)") +  # Add labels
geom_density(fill = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +  # Fill color with transparency
